steps.notes: Empty state copy updated to match spec. Error boundary is a client component with console.error + reset() button. Loading skeleton mirrors dashboard layout with bg-ink/5 circles; no spinner. README gained a 'Running locally' section documenting APP_PASSWORD, SESSION_SECRET, and the /login entry point. frontend-ideation.md got a blockquote at the top linking to the plan. All five plan step headings updated from '✅ pending' to '✅'.

assumptions: The existing empty-state branch in page.tsx (groups.length === 0) was already in place from Step 4; Step 5 only updated the copy and added HTML entities for the apostrophe.
Loading skeleton intentionally omits habit name and section data since it renders before the server component resolves.
app/loading.tsx is a server component (no 'use client' directive) per Next.js convention for route-level loading UI.
